$schema: Named steps the IngestionAgent + DataLoadingSkill perform during file upload.

units.name: load_workbook
units.instruction: Read a CSV or multi-sheet Excel workbook. For Excel, load all sheets into a dict.

units.name: detect_data_type
units.instruction: Classify the dataset: olink_npx | ms_lfq | ms_tmt | ms_silac | generic. Use column heuristics and metadata sheet hints.

units.name: detect_orientation
units.instruction: Determine whether rows are proteins or samples; transpose if needed so proteins are rows.

units.name: detect_pooled_design
units.instruction: Detect MaxQuant-style pooled designs by looking for an Identifier Info sheet mapping single-letter codes (A,B,C…) to group names.

units.name: extract_sample_columns
units.instruction: Identify numeric sample columns (intensities, SpC, ratios). Separate from metadata (gene names, accessions, MW).

units.name: infer_groups
units.instruction: Call the group-inference LLM to aggregate sample columns into biological groups. Reject single-sample groups (a group MUST have >=2 columns).

units.name: persist_state
units.instruction: Write detected metadata (n_proteins, n_samples, sample_columns, label_map, all_sheets, inferred_groups) to BiomarkerState.
